content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 22, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
The registry saw continued expansion of the ElizaOS ecosystem today with the successful integration of a new plugin and the submission of a proposal for Solana-based escrow and reputation services.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Registry Expansion
* Integrated `@elisym/plugin-elizaos` into the registry by updating `index.json` with the correct package name and repository source ([#346](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/346)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* [#348](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/348): Add `@holdfastprotocol/eliza-plugin` — Proposes the addition of a plugin focused on Solana escrow and reputation functionality for ElizaOS agents.

## CLOSED ISSUES
* None

## NEW ISSUES
* None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
* None
